// src/pages/Donate.js import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './Donate.css'; const Donate = () => { const donationOptions = [ { title: "One-Time Donation", description: "Make a single donation to support our wildlife conservation efforts", amount: "$50", features: [ "Support immediate conservation needs", "Help protect endangered species", "Contribute to community education" ] }, { title: "Monthly Support", description: "Become a monthly donor and make a lasting impact", amount: "$25/month", features: [ "Sustained support for conservation", "Regular updates on our work", "Exclusive donor newsletter" ] }, { title: "Wildlife Guardian", description: "Make a significant contribution to protect wildlife", amount: "$100", features: [ "Adopt a conservation project", "Personalized impact report", "Invitation to special events" ] } ]; return (

Support Wildlife Conservation

Your donation helps protect endangered species and their habitats

{donationOptions.map((option, index) => (

{option.title}

{option.description}

{option.amount}

    {option.features.map((feature, i) => (
  • {feature}
    • ))}
Donate Now
))}

How Your Donation Helps

Habitat Protection

Support the preservation of critical wildlife habitats

Community Education

Fund educational programs for local communities

Research & Monitoring

Enable scientific research and wildlife monitoring

Your Impact

1000+

Animals Protected

50+

Conservation Projects

10,000+

Community Members Educated

); }; export default Donate;
